headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on MGM Resorts International, Raises Price Target to $42
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Daniel Politzer   maintains MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $41 to $42.

headline: IAC: Sum-Of-The-Parts Suggests Shares Remain Undervalued
summary: IAC looks undervalued vs. sum-of-the-parts, driven by People Digital, MGM stake, and HoldCo cash as the markets discount complexity. Read more here.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Underweight on MGM Resorts International, Lowers Price Target to $30

headline: IAC Inc. Has Surged Over 25% In Six Months, Here Is Why?
summary: IAC Inc. (NASDAQ:IAC) is one of the 10 Best Internet Content and Information Stocks to Buy. Over the past six months, IAC Inc. (NASDAQ:IAC) has surged over 25%, and in the last month, the shares rose over 9.50%. Comparing the 19.50% return in the one-year period as of April 13, with the five-year negative returns […]
